items.name: StoonDB
items.description: StoonDB is a blazing-fast, native macOS alternative to XAMPP and MAMP. Built with SwiftUI, it seamlessly integrates with Homebrew to manage your local MySQL server and serve phpMyAdmin. Enjoy zero-config auto-login, instant startup, and a beautiful Simple UI, all without touching the terminal. Say goodbye to bulky Electron apps!
